---
name: RFC (Request for Comments)
about: Propose an architectural change, a new protocol, or a major surface change
title: "[rfc] "
labels: rfc, stage:rfc-needed
assignees: ''
---

## Background

What is the current state? Cite `../../docs/MYCELIUM.md`, `../../docs/SPECIFICATION.md`, and any relevant ADRs.

## Motivation

Why change the current design? What does the project gain?

## Proposal

What you are proposing, in enough detail that a reviewer can implement it without further questions.

## Compatibility

- Backwards compatibility (data format, protocol, plugin contract)
- Migration path
- Affected milestones

## Alternatives

Other designs you considered, and why this is the recommended one.

## Open questions

Anything you are not sure about and want feedback on.

## Acceptance

- [ ] Approval from at least one CODEOWNER for the affected area
- [ ] Approval from a second maintainer for security-sensitive areas
- [ ] An ADR is written and merged before implementation begins
